turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I'm a 34-year-old accountant and I hate my job. I want to become a UX designer but everyone thinks I'm crazy for wanting to start over.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: You're not crazy—career pivots at 34 are increasingly common, and accounting skills (systematic thinking, data analysis) map surprisingly well to UX research. What's your biggest fear about making the switch?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Taking a pay cut while I build a portfolio. I have a mortgage. But staying feels like slow death.

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: I'm a 34-year-old accountant and I hate my job. I want to become a UX designer but everyone thinks I'm crazy for wanting to start over.

scores.rationale: Desire to make major career change against social pressure shows high risk tolerance.
Career pivot impulse reflects desire for novelty and challenge.
Explicit statement of hating current job.
Openness to experience is high given desire for dramatic change.
